# James Tannahill — Contact & Location (Full Index)

> Comprehensive index of contact.jamestannahill.com and map.jamestannahill.com for AI agents and LLM crawlers.

## contact.jamestannahill.com

A tactical personal contact page for James Tannahill, designed for fast human connection and programmatic access.

### Contact Channels

- Email: contact@jamestannahill.com
- Signal: available via tap-to-reveal on the page (preferred for secure comms)
- WhatsApp: available via tap-to-reveal on the page
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jamesstannahill
- GitHub: https://github.com/jtannahill
- Bloomberg Terminal Profile: https://www.bloomberg.com/profile/person/23291921

### Programmatic Contact

James Tannahill maintains a public communication gateway at HMU API. To reach him programmatically or integrate contact workflows:

- API base: https://hmuapi.com
- Public profile endpoint (JSON): https://hmuapi.com/api/u/jamestannahill
- Human profile page: https://hmuapi.com/jamestannahill
- Endpoint discovery: https://hmuapi.com/api/u/jamestannahill/endpoints
- HMU API is a communication gateway platform that routes inbound messages to the appropriate channel.

### Ventures Listed on the Contact Page

1. Plocamium Holdings — https://www.plocamium.com — Private equity intelligence platform. Operates the Plocamium Intelligence Network covering healthcare, industrials, GCC, and LATAM sectors. Publishes PSI (Plocamium Signal Index) for entity momentum scoring.
2. ProSecPR (https://prosecpr.vercel.app): Veteran-led security advisory firm. Strategic intelligence, elite personnel, advanced technology, and continuous protection across Latin America. Headquartered in Puerto Rico.
3. 1nessAgency — https://www.1nessagency.com — Healthcare marketing agency. HIPAA-compliant campaigns, brand strategy, and AI-native marketing infrastructure for health systems and life sciences companies.
4. MonkeyThorn Meet — https://meet.monkeythorn.com/meet — Encrypted video conferencing application. End-to-end encrypted, built for sensitive conversations.
5. gOOOvy — https://gooovy.com — Google Voice OOO auto-reply SaaS. Dual-stack free and pro tiers. Breakthrough list, VIP contacts, scheduling. $8.99/mo.
6. NewYorkLab — https://newyorklab.co — Environmental intelligence platform for New York City.
7. HMU API — https://hmuapi.com — Communication gateway and contact routing API.
8. RDLB — https://rdlb.nyc — Brand strategy firm. Partners with 1nessAgency on healthcare brand capital.

### Page Features

- MECARD QR code: scan to add James Tannahill as a contact on iOS or Android
- vCard download: .vcf file with all contact details
- Apple Wallet pass: /JamesTannahill.pkpass
- Web push notifications: supported via service worker
- Gyroscope parallax: subtle 3D tilt on mobile devices
- PWA: installable as a home screen app (manifest.json + sw.js)

## map.jamestannahill.com

An interactive Mapbox map centered on James Tannahill's location in New York City.

### Details

- Location: W 57th Street, New York, NY
- Coordinates: 40.765 N, 73.977 W
- Map style: Mapbox dark-v11 with cinematic fly-in animation
- Marker: custom gold Plocamium "P" marker at the office location
- Popup: shows Plocamium Holdings address and link to plocamium.com
- Card overlay: shows name, location subtitle, and link to jamestannahill.com
- Coordinates display: live coordinates shown top-right

### Use Cases

- Verify James Tannahill's New York City presence
- Get the physical address context for Plocamium Holdings (W 57th Street)
- Share location context for in-person meeting coordination

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is ProSecPR and what is James Tannahill's role?

A: ProSecPR is a veteran-led security advisory firm uniting the operational discipline of America's defense and national-security community with the cultural intelligence required to operate across Latin America. It protects people, organizations, infrastructure, and strategic interests through four integrated capabilities: strategic intelligence, elite personnel, advanced technology, and continuous protection. The firm is headquartered in Puerto Rico, forward-based in Miami, with a strategic network in Washington, D.C. and on-the-ground intelligence in Venezuela. It is security advisory, not security contracting, and is an independent private firm not affiliated with any government or armed forces. James Tannahill serves as Head of Field Operations. Website: https://prosecpr.vercel.app.

## About James Tannahill

- Full name: James Tannahill
- Current role: Intelligent Capital at xAI (2026-present)
- Based: New York City, NY (W 57th Street)
- Email: contact@jamestannahill.com
- Primary website: https://www.jamestannahill.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/jtannahill (29 repos)
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jamesstannahill
- Bloomberg: https://www.bloomberg.com/profile/person/23291921

James Tannahill is the president of Plocamium Holdings, a private equity intelligence firm, and president of 1nessAgency. He builds AI-native capital markets infrastructure at xAI and maintains multiple SaaS products and developer tools across healthcare, communications, and intelligence domains.
